description: User submits their phone number to receive an OTP code
User successfully verifies their OTP code and is authenticated
User requests a new OTP code to be sent to their phone
User completes profile setup during onboarding (display name, bio, vibes)
User swipes left or right on a venue/spot card in the Discover feed
User swipes left or right on an event card in the Discover feed
User taps through to view full spot detail (top of spot conversion funnel)
User taps through to view full event detail (top of event conversion funnel)
User RSVPs to an event or cancels their RSVP
User sends a companion request to another attendee at an event
User accepts or declines an incoming companion request
User toggles Ghost Mode (anonymous browsing) on or off
User saves edits to their display name or bio
User signs out of the app
